title: CHIK-FLOW pipeline parameters
description: Nextflow pipeline for chikungunya virus sequencing analysis

input.description: CSV samplesheet with sample, fastq_1, fastq_2 columns.

reference_fasta.description: Optional FASTA reference panel used by downstream CHIKV modules. Defaults to the bundled curated CHIKV panel.

reference_gff.description: Optional GFF annotation for reference panel records. Defaults to the bundled NC_004162.2 annotation.

genotype_references.description: Optional curated FASTA for nearest-reference genotype/lineage and wild/vaccine source assignment. Defaults to the bundled curated CHIKV panel. Headers must include genotype=, lineage=, and source=wild or source=vaccine labels.

skip_alignment.description: Skip BWA-MEM alignment and BAM processing.

skip_coverage.description: Skip per-base depth and coverage summary.

skip_consensus.description: Skip variant calling and consensus FASTA generation.

skip_phylogeny.description: Skip batch consensus distance tree generation.

skip_report.description: Skip final batch HTML/PDF report generation.

min_consensus_depth.description: Minimum depth required to keep a consensus base unmasked.

reference_min_kmer_identity.description: Minimum selected-reference k-mer identity required for high-confidence reference selection.

reference_min_matched_read_fraction.description: Minimum fraction of reads with at least one selected-reference k-mer match required for high-confidence reference selection.

reference_min_score_margin.description: Minimum selected-reference score margin over the runner-up required for high-confidence reference selection.
